ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "unadjusted_volume" INTEGER /* Unadjusted trading volume of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the date (e.g., Aug 5, 13) */,
  "change_over_time" REAL /* Change in price over time */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed on the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "daily_return" REAL /* Daily return of the stock */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the stock */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) of the stock */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) of the stock */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average True Range (ATR) of the stock */,
  "adx" REAL /* Average Directional Index (ADX) of the stock */,
  "performance_change" REAL /* Change in performance metrics from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Custom message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the alert is sent (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
